notes: Polars is in pyproject.toml core deps. Filtered case_001 fixture is ~3 KB across 7 ASCII tables; runtime is dominated by parsing 7 tiny files. The capture step is bulk: download 73 MB ZIP, extract to ~430 MB, scan with Polars in ~5 s, persist <10 KB filtered subset. Capture-time scratch is reclaimed; runtime memory under 100 MB.
